etimesDelhi’s biggest Metro fan? This man boards the first train of every new line– here’s his surprising storyFor 24 years, 65-year-old Anil Marwah has been the first passenger on every new Delhi Metro line, a tradition sparked by his fascination with Japan's transit system. He meticulously collects smart cards, photos, and clippings, documenting his 42nd journey on the latest Deepali Chowk to Majlis Park route. Marwah hopes to continue this unique passion.
